news.title:
Laxmi Organic gains 2.3%, rising from Rs.113.85 to Rs.116.50.
Outperformed Sensex, which fell 4.9%, amid market weakness.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic gains 2.3%, rising from Rs.113.85 to Rs.116.50.
Outperformed Sensex, which fell 4.9%, amid market weakness.

news.title: Laxmi Organic Industries Ltd submitted a disclosure on litigation update.
news.summary: Laxmi Organic Industries Ltd submitted a disclosure on litigation update.

news.title:
CRISIL downgraded Laxmi Organic's long-term rating to 'AA Negative', reaffirming short-term rating 'A1'.
Revenue declined 9% in fiscal 2026 to ₹2,071 crore; profitability dropped due to lower realizations and margins.
news.summary:
CRISIL downgraded Laxmi Organic's long-term rating to 'AA Negative', reaffirming short-term rating 'A1'.
Revenue declined 9% in fiscal 2026 to ₹2,071 crore; profitability dropped due to lower realizations and margins.

news.title:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.
news.summary:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic Industries held its Q3 FY26 earnings call, discussing global chemical challenges, demand trends, and operational updates, including progress at Dahej and Lote facilities.
Q3 revenues declined 9% YoY; EBITDA fell 33% to INR 50 cr. Acetic acid prices rose in December, aiding Essentials' margins, while Specialties faced pricing pressure and phased-out products.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic Industries held its Q3 FY26 earnings call, discussing global chemical challenges, demand trends, and operational updates, including progress at Dahej and Lote facilities.
Q3 revenues declined 9% YoY; EBITDA fell 33% to INR 50 cr. Acetic acid prices rose in December, aiding Essentials' margins, while Specialties faced pricing pressure and phased-out products.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic downgraded to Below Average on 3 Nov 2025 due to weak fundamentals.
Despite a price uptick on 1 Feb 2026, weak profitability led to a Strong Sell rating.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic downgraded to Below Average on 3 Nov 2025 due to weak fundamentals.
Despite a price uptick on 1 Feb 2026, weak profitability led to a Strong Sell rating.

news.title:
Laxmi Organics plans FY27 expansion with Dahej Phase 2 for growth.
Projects significant growth in FY28 despite 9% revenue dip in Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organics plans FY27 expansion with Dahej Phase 2 for growth.
Projects significant growth in FY28 despite 9% revenue dip in Q3 FY26.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic held an analyst meet on Jan 30, 2026, for Q3 & 9M FY26 results.
The presentation covered company overview, product mix, R&D, and growth-focused strategy.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic held an analyst meet on Jan 30, 2026, for Q3 & 9M FY26 results.
The presentation covered company overview, product mix, R&D, and growth-focused strategy.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic posted Q3 net profit of 254M INR, down from 293M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue fell to 7.2B INR compared to 7.86B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic posted Q3 net profit of 254M INR, down from 293M INR YoY.
Q3 revenue fell to 7.2B INR compared to 7.86B INR YoY.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic Industries schedules Analyst/Investor Meet on Jan 30, 2026, at 2 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
Key participants include CEO Dr. Rajan Venkatesh and CFO Mr. Mahadeo Karnik; registration details are provided.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic Industries schedules Analyst/Investor Meet on Jan 30, 2026, at 2 PM IST to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
Key participants include CEO Dr. Rajan Venkatesh and CFO Mr. Mahadeo Karnik; registration details are provided.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic's credit rating outlook shifted from Stable to Negative.
Ratings reaffirmed as IND AA Negative, IND A1; update dated Dec 23, 2025.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic's credit rating outlook shifted from Stable to Negative.
Ratings reaffirmed as IND AA Negative, IND A1; update dated Dec 23, 2025.

news.title:
CRISIL revises Laxmi Organic's long-term bank facilities outlook to Negative from Stable.
Ratings reaffirmed at Crisil AA for long-term and Crisil A1 for short-term facilities.
news.summary:
CRISIL revises Laxmi Organic's long-term bank facilities outlook to Negative from Stable.
Ratings reaffirmed at Crisil AA for long-term and Crisil A1 for short-term facilities.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic announces investor meet on Nov 13, 2025, hosted by Anand Rathi in Mumbai.
Discussions will use public info only; no UPSI to be shared during the meeting.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic announces investor meet on Nov 13, 2025, hosted by Anand Rathi in Mumbai.
Discussions will use public info only; no UPSI to be shared during the meeting.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic held Q2 FY26 call on Oct 30, 2025; no sensitive info shared.
Revenue fell 9%; specialty chemicals dropped 20%; Dahej, Lote projects on track.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic held Q2 FY26 call on Oct 30, 2025; no sensitive info shared.
Revenue fell 9%; specialty chemicals dropped 20%; Dahej, Lote projects on track.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic targets Rs. 80 Cr fluorine chemical revenue by FY26.
Capitalization plan of Rs. 800 Cr to conclude by FY26, rest by FY27.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic targets Rs. 80 Cr fluorine chemical revenue by FY26.
Capitalization plan of Rs. 800 Cr to conclude by FY26, rest by FY27.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic Industries announced Q2FY26 investor meeting to discuss performance and shared the enclosed presentation.
Despite challenges, H1FY26 saw strong cash flow, Dahej facility phase 1 production began, and GST incentive of INR 234.46 mn included.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic Industries announced Q2FY26 investor meeting to discuss performance and shared the enclosed presentation.
Despite challenges, H1FY26 saw strong cash flow, Dahej facility phase 1 production began, and GST incentive of INR 234.46 mn included.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic's Q2 EBITDA fell to 371M INR from 746.9M YoY.
EBITDA margin decreased to 5.3% from 9.68% YoY.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic's Q2 EBITDA fell to 371M INR from 746.9M YoY.
EBITDA margin decreased to 5.3% from 9.68% YoY.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic approved Q2, H1 results for Sept 30, 2025; Independent Director reappointed for 3 years.
Reallocated ₹345.86M QIP funds to Dahej Project; expenditure timeline revised to June 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic approved Q2, H1 results for Sept 30, 2025; Independent Director reappointed for 3 years.
Reallocated ₹345.86M QIP funds to Dahej Project; expenditure timeline revised to June 30, 2026.

news.title:
Laxmi Organic granted 429,799 stock options to employees, convertible to 1 equity share each of ₹2 face value.
Exercise price set at ₹146 per share; options vested immediately, exercisable within 5 years.
news.summary:
Laxmi Organic granted 429,799 stock options to employees, convertible to 1 equity share each of ₹2 face value.
Exercise price set at ₹146 per share; options vested immediately, exercisable within 5 years.
